data.id: TR-EXEC-002: CLR Hosting in Native Process (.NET In-Memory Execution)
data.name: TR-EXEC-002: CLR Hosting in Native Process (.NET In-Memory Execution)
data.description: Detects mscoree.dll loaded by a native (non-.NET) process, or imports of CLRCreateInstance / _CorDllMain. This is the primary mechanism for execute-assembly, Cobalt Strike BOF .NET execution, and SharpPick-style attacks. _CorDllMain: Score=100, MalCount=15. CLRCreateInstance: Score=100.
data.contents: (process.modules contains 'mscoree.dll' OR process.modules contains 'clrjit.dll') AND process.name != 'powershell.exe' AND process.name != 'pwsh.exe' AND process.name != 'msbuild.exe' AND process.name != 'csc.exe' AND process.name != 'vbc.exe' AND process.name != 'devenv.exe' AND process.name != 'dotnet.exe' AND process.name != 'w3wp.exe' AND process.name != 'iisexpress.exe'
